entry.title: Rocky Jones Menace From Outer Space (1956)-(Adventure,Family,Sci-Fi,TV Movie)

link.title: Rocky Jones Menace From Outer Space (1956)-(Adventure,Family,Sci-Fi,TV Movie)

entry.content:
Menace from Outer Space (1956)
Unrated		 1h 18min Adventure, Family, Sci-Fi TV Movie
A two-part episode of the sci-fi TV series Rocky Jones, Space Ranger (1954), released as a feature.
Director: Hollingsworth Morse
Writer: Warren Wilson
Stars: Richard Crane, Scotty Beckett, Sally Mansfield
entry.summary: Menace from Outer Space (1956) Unrated 1h 18min Adventure, Family, Sci-Fi TV Movie A two-part episode of the sci-fi TV series Rocky Jones, Space Ranger (1954), released as a feature. Director: Hollingsworth Morse Writer: Warren Wilson Stars: Richard Crane, Scotty Beckett, Sally Mansfield

entry.title: UFC On ESPN 14: Robert Whittaker vs. Darren Till Full Match

link.title: UFC On ESPN 14: Robert Whittaker vs. Darren Till Full Match

entry.content:
UFC On ESPN 14: Robert Whittaker vs. Darren Till Full Match
Robert Whittaker def. Darren Till via unanimous decision (48-47, 48-47, 48-47)
entry.summary: UFC On ESPN 14: Robert Whittaker vs. Darren Till Full Match Robert Whittaker def. Darren Till via unanimous decision (48-47, 48-47, 48-47)

entry.title: Cannabis : fumer un joint sera seulement passible d’une amende de 200 euros

link.title: Cannabis : fumer un joint sera seulement passible d’une amende de 200 euros

entry.content: En déplacement à Nice pour faire des annonces relatives à la lutte contre l’insécurité, le Premier ministre Jean Castex a annoncé la généralisation de l’amende forfaitaire pour consommation de drogue, déjà expérimentée dans certains départements.
entry.summary: En déplacement à Nice pour faire des annonces relatives à la lutte contre l’insécurité, le Premier ministre Jean Castex a annoncé la généralisation de l’amende forfaitaire pour consommation de drogue, déjà expérimentée dans certains départements.

entry.title: Colombes : le maire compare les forces de l’ordre à la police de Vichy

link.title: Colombes : le maire compare les forces de l’ordre à la police de Vichy

entry.content: A l’occasion de la Commémoration du 78e anniversaire de la rafle du Vélodrome d’hiver, le 19 juillet à Colombes, le maire de la ville a comparé les forces de l’ordre actuelles à celles sous Vichy. L’élu des Hauts-de-Seine a évoqué les policiers qui selon lui « avec le même zèle » que ceux de l’époque « traquent les migrants, les sans-papiers, les déboutés des droits humains ».La scène, filmée et diffusée sur Twitter, a indigné les internautes… jusqu’à Gérald Darmanin. Le ministère de l’Intérieur a réagi sur le réseau social dimanche soir, menaçant de « porter plainte » si les propos étaient confirmés.
entry.summary: A l’occasion de la Commémoration du 78e anniversaire de la rafle du Vélodrome d’hiver, le 19 juillet à Colombes, le maire de la ville a comparé les forces de l’ordre actuelles à celles sous Vichy. L’élu des Hauts-de-Seine a évoqué les policiers qui selon lui « avec le même zèle » que ceux de l’époque « traquent les migrants, les sans-papiers, les déboutés des droits humains ».La scène, filmée et diffusée sur Twitter, a indigné les internautes… jusqu’à Gérald Darmanin. Le ministère de l’Intérieur a réagi sur le réseau social dimanche soir, menaçant de « porter plainte » si les propos étaient confirmés.

entry.title: Eng vs WI 3rd Day 1 : Pope and Buttler to the rescue

link.title: Eng vs WI 3rd Day 1 : Pope and Buttler to the rescue

entry.content:
#engvswi
#engvwi
Ollie Pope and Jos Buttler made unbeaten half-centuries to give England the edge on day one of the decisive third Test against West Indies at Old Trafford.
இங்கிலாந்து - வெஸ்ட் இண்டீஸ் அணிகள் இடையே ஆன மூன்றாவது டெஸ்ட் போட்டி மான்செஸ்டர் நகரில் துவங்கியது.
entry.summary: #engvswi #engvwi Ollie Pope and Jos Buttler made unbeaten half-centuries to give England the edge on day one of the decisive third Test against West Indies at Old Trafford. இங்கிலாந்து - வெஸ்ட் இண்டீஸ் அணிகள் இடையே ஆன மூன்றாவது டெஸ்ட் போட்டி மான்செஸ்டர் நகரில் துவங்கியது.

link.title: Blindfold Challenge

entry.content: The TME team are tested with with another Blindfold Challenge! Let’s see if they guess what any of the items placed in front of them are.

entry.title: Jothimani Question To Rajinikanth OBC Reservation kandhaSastiKavasam Issue

link.title: Jothimani Question To Rajinikanth OBC Reservation kandhaSastiKavasam Issue

entry.content:
பிற்படுத்தப்பட்டோர், இதர பிற்படுத்தபட்டோரின் இடஒதுக்கீடு உரிமை பறிப்பு விவகாரத்தில் கருத்து எதுவுமே இல்லையா? என்று நடிகர் ரஜினிகாந்துக்கு காங்கிரஸ் கட்சியின் லோக்சபா எம்.பி. ஜோதிமணி கேள்வி எழுப்பியுள்ளார்.
Cong MP Jothimani has questioned to Actor Rajinikanth on OBC Reservation
#KarupparKoottam
#kandhaSastiKavasam
#CongressJothimani
entry.summary: பிற்படுத்தப்பட்டோர், இதர பிற்படுத்தபட்டோரின் இடஒதுக்கீடு உரிமை பறிப்பு விவகாரத்தில் கருத்து எதுவுமே இல்லையா? என்று நடிகர் ரஜினிகாந்துக்கு காங்கிரஸ் கட்சியின் லோக்சபா எம்.பி. ஜோதிமணி கேள்வி எழுப்பியுள்ளார். Cong MP Jothimani has questioned to Actor Rajinikanth on OBC Reservation #KarupparKoottam #kandhaSastiKavasam #CongressJothimani

entry.title: Mother duck leads her babies back to canal in Japan

link.title: Mother duck leads her babies back to canal in Japan

entry.content:
Adorable footage shows a family of ducks being assisted by traffic police on the sidewalk before jumping down into a canal.
Nagomu Nozaki said he saw the mother duck and babies walking like they were looking for something in Sendai, Japan.
So out of curiosity, he followed them and was amused by how calm they were around the cop before she leads them all back to the water.
Nagomu said: "Based on my observation I think the mother duck teaches her children survival skills on how to land safely from the ground or the water.
The clip was filmed on May 26.
entry.summary: Adorable footage shows a family of ducks being assisted by traffic police on the sidewalk before jumping down into a canal. Nagomu Nozaki said he saw the mother duck and babies walking like they were looking for something in Sendai, Japan. So out of curiosity, he followed them and was amused by how calm they were around the cop before she leads them all back to the water. Nagomu said: "Based on my observation I think the mother duck teaches her children survival skills on how to land safely from the ground or the water. The clip was filmed on May 26.

entry.title: Tara Alisha Berry की Hotness उड़ा देगी आपके रातों की नींद Tara Alisha Berry Bikni Look Viral

link.title: Tara Alisha Berry की Hotness उड़ा देगी आपके रातों की नींद Tara Alisha Berry Bikni Look Viral

entry.content:
Tara Alisha Berry is one of the famous actresses of web series and south Indian movies. Tara Alisha Berry’s Hotness will leave you in shock. Tara alisha berry bikni photos goes viral on internet and people are getting crazy for actresses hot andaz.
इस साल एमएक्स प्लेयर पर रिलीज हुई वेब सीरीज ‘मस्तराम’ के जरिए फैंस के बीच तहलका मचा चुकीं एक्ट्रेस तारा अलीशा बेरी एक बार फिर अपनी बोल्ड फोटोज के कारण चर्चा में हैं। इस सीरीज में तारा अलीशा बेरी ने एक से बढ़कर एक बोल्ड सीन्स दिए थे। वीडियो में देखें अदाकारा का हॉट अंदाज । \
#TaraAlishaBerry #BollywoodActressBikniLookViral
entry.summary: Tara Alisha Berry is one of the famous actresses of web series and south Indian movies. Tara Alisha Berry’s Hotness will leave you in shock. Tara alisha berry bikni photos goes viral on internet and people are getting crazy for actresses hot andaz. इस साल एमएक्स प्लेयर पर रिलीज हुई वेब सीरीज ‘मस्तराम’ के जरिए फैंस के बीच तहलका मचा चुकीं एक्ट्रेस तारा अलीशा बेरी एक बार फिर अपनी बोल्ड फोटोज के कारण चर्चा में हैं। इस सीरीज में तारा अलीशा बेरी ने एक से बढ़कर एक बोल्ड सीन्स दिए थे। वीडियो में देखें अदाकारा का हॉट अंदाज । \ #TaraAlishaBerry #BollywoodActressBikniLookViral

entry.title: Brooks cashes in at Vegas, claims sixth win of 2020

link.title: Brooks cashes in at Vegas, claims sixth win of 2020

entry.content: The season of Justin Brooks continues as the JTG Daugherty Throttlers driver claimed his sixth win of the 2020 eNASCAR Heat Pro League season at Las Vegas Motor Speedway.
entry.summary: The season of Justin Brooks continues as the JTG Daugherty Throttlers driver claimed his sixth win of the 2020 eNASCAR Heat Pro League season at Las Vegas Motor Speedway.

entry.title: Poland To Exit Treaty Designed To End Domestic Violence And Discrimination Against Women

link.title: Poland To Exit Treaty Designed To End Domestic Violence And Discrimination Against Women

entry.content:
Poland is to begin the process of withdrawing from a European treaty aimed at combating violence against women.
Justice Minister Zbigniew Ziobro announced Saturday that Poland will exit the Council of Europe’s Istanbul Convention on Monday.
According to CNN, the Istanbul Convention aims to protect women against violence and to help bring about the end of discrimination against them.
Poland is facing harsh criticism for the move. Thousands of people gathered in Warsaw and other cities on Friday to protest.
Violence is not a traditional value. The EU and all of its members signed because Europe stands for human rights, equality and decency. Guy Verhofstadt Former Belgian Prime Minister
entry.summary: Poland is to begin the process of withdrawing from a European treaty aimed at combating violence against women. Justice Minister Zbigniew Ziobro announced Saturday that Poland will exit the Council of Europe’s Istanbul Convention on Monday. According to CNN, the Istanbul Convention aims to protect women against violence and to help bring about the end of discrimination against them. Poland is facing harsh criticism for the move. Thousands of people gathered in Warsaw and other cities on Friday to protest. Violence is not a traditional value. The EU and all of its members signed because Europe stands for human rights, equality and decency. Guy Verhofstadt Former Belgian Prime Minister

entry.title: La Chine prend possession du consulat des États-Unis à Chengdu

link.title: La Chine prend possession du consulat des États-Unis à Chengdu

entry.content: La manœuvre met fin à un épisode de sanctions mutuelles digne de la guerre froide. Lundi 27 juillet, des fonctionnaires chinois ont pénétré dans l’enceinte du consulat des États-Unis à Chengdu, peu après le départ des derniers employés de Washington. Très symboliquement, la bannière étoilée des États-Unis avait été descendue peu auparavant à l’intérieur du complexe diplomatique, selon des images de la télévision chinoise.
entry.summary: La manœuvre met fin à un épisode de sanctions mutuelles digne de la guerre froide. Lundi 27 juillet, des fonctionnaires chinois ont pénétré dans l’enceinte du consulat des États-Unis à Chengdu, peu après le départ des derniers employés de Washington. Très symboliquement, la bannière étoilée des États-Unis avait été descendue peu auparavant à l’intérieur du complexe diplomatique, selon des images de la télévision chinoise.

entry.title: #WATCH : తల్లి ప్రేమ.. దుండగుల నుండి ఒంటి చేత్తో బిడ్డను కాపాడుకున్న తల్లి! Oneindia Telugu

link.title: #WATCH : తల్లి ప్రేమ.. దుండగుల నుండి ఒంటి చేత్తో బిడ్డను కాపాడుకున్న తల్లి! Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
తల్లి ప్రేమ ముందు ఏ దుష్టశక్తి కూడా పనిచేయదని ఎన్నోసార్లు రుజువైంది. తాజాగా ఢిల్లీలో జరిగిన ఓ ఘటన ఇందుకు నిదర్శనంగా నిలిచింది. తన కూతురును అపహరించేందుకు ప్రయత్నించిన దుండగుల బారి నుంచి ఆదిశక్తిలా మారిన తల్లి.. వారిని తరిమికొట్టింది. ఇందుకు సంబంధించిన దృశ్యాలు అక్క సీసీ కెమెరాల్లో రికార్డయ్యాయి.
#Mother
#ViralVideo
#MothersLove
#MotherCourage
#Delhi
#CCTVfootage
entry.summary: తల్లి ప్రేమ ముందు ఏ దుష్టశక్తి కూడా పనిచేయదని ఎన్నోసార్లు రుజువైంది. తాజాగా ఢిల్లీలో జరిగిన ఓ ఘటన ఇందుకు నిదర్శనంగా నిలిచింది. తన కూతురును అపహరించేందుకు ప్రయత్నించిన దుండగుల బారి నుంచి ఆదిశక్తిలా మారిన తల్లి.. వారిని తరిమికొట్టింది. ఇందుకు సంబంధించిన దృశ్యాలు అక్క సీసీ కెమెరాల్లో రికార్డయ్యాయి. #Mother #ViralVideo #MothersLove #MotherCourage #Delhi #CCTVfootage

entry.title: Red Sox Vs. Orioles Series Preview

link.title: Red Sox Vs. Orioles Series Preview

entry.content: The Boston Red Sox take on the Baltimore Orioles to kick off the 2020 regular season. Meredith Gorman previews the series.
entry.summary: The Boston Red Sox take on the Baltimore Orioles to kick off the 2020 regular season. Meredith Gorman previews the series.

entry.title: How to Enable Dark Mode in Gmail App on an iPhone?

link.title: How to Enable Dark Mode in Gmail App on an iPhone?

entry.content:
How to Enable Dark Mode in Gmail App on an iPhone?
Note: First Update your Gmail App by going to the App Store, if you have not updated it yet. After that, follow the instructions below:-
Step 1: Open ‘Gmail’ App, and then sign-in to your account, If you have not.
Step 2: Tap on ‘Menu (Three Horizontal lines)’ icon at the top left.
Step 3: Tap on ‘Settings.’
Step 4: Tap on ‘Theme.’
Note: If you don’t find Theme Section, then you need to sign-out of Gmail App, and then Sign-in again.
How to Sign Out of Gmail App on an iPhone?
Step 5: Tap on ‘Dark’ in order select it.
It’s done.
Thanks for watching, please like and subscribe
==============================================
entry.summary: How to Enable Dark Mode in Gmail App on an iPhone? Note: First Update your Gmail App by going to the App Store, if you have not updated it yet. After that, follow the instructions below:- Step 1: Open ‘Gmail’ App, and then sign-in to your account, If you have not. Step 2: Tap on ‘Menu (Three Horizontal lines)’ icon at the top left. Step 3: Tap on ‘Settings.’ Step 4: Tap on ‘Theme.’ Note: If you don’t find Theme Section, then you need to sign-out of Gmail App, and then Sign-in again. How to Sign Out of Gmail App on an iPhone? Step 5: Tap on ‘Dark’ in order select it. It’s done. Thanks for watching, please like and subscribe ==============================================

entry.title: ಮನೆಮದ್ದುಗಳು: ಶೀತ ಕಡಿಮೆ ಮಾಡಲು ಈ ಔಷಧಗಳು ಬೆಸ್ಟ್ Home Remedies For Cold Boldsky Kannada

link.title: ಮನೆಮದ್ದುಗಳು: ಶೀತ ಕಡಿಮೆ ಮಾಡಲು ಈ ಔಷಧಗಳು ಬೆಸ್ಟ್ Home Remedies For Cold Boldsky Kannada

entry.content:
ಸಾಮಾನ್ಯ ಶೀತದಷ್ಟೇ ಸರ್ವೇ ಸಾಮಾನ್ಯವಾಗಿದ್ದು ಶೀತಕ್ಕೆ ಮಾಡುವ ಮನೆಮದ್ದುಗಳು. ಈಗಂತೂ ಶೀತ, ಕೆಮ್ಮು ಬಂದಾಗ ಆಸ್ಪತ್ರೆಗೆ ಹೋಗುವ ಬದಲು ಮನೆ ಮದ್ದುಗಳ ಮೊರೆ ಹೋಗುತ್ತಿದ್ದೇವೆ. ಆದರೆ ಕೆಲವೊಂದು ಮನೆಮದ್ದುಗಳನ್ನು ಮಾಡಿದಾಗ ಬೇಗ ಗುಣಮುಖವಾದರೆ, ಇನ್ನು ಕೆಲವೊಮ್ಮೇ ಯಾವುದೇ ಪರಿಣಾಮ ಬೀರುವುದಿಲ್ಲ. ಏಕೆ ಕೆಲವೊಮ್ಮೆ ಸಾಮಾನ್ಯ ಶೀತಕ್ಕೆ ಮಾಡುವ ಮನೆಮದ್ದುಗಳು, ಆ್ಯಂಟಿಬಯೋಟಿಕ್‌ಗಳು ಶೀತವನ್ನು ಕಡಿಮೆ ಮಾಡುವುದಿಲ್ಲ, ಶೀತ ಕಡಿಮೆ ಮಾಡಲು ಏನು ಮಾಡಬೇಕು, ಯಾವ ಮದ್ದುಗಳು ಸಾಮಾನ್ಯ ಶೀತ ಕಡಿಮೆ ಮಾಡಲು ಸಹಕಾರಿ ಎಂಬ ಮಾಹಿತಿ ನೀಡಿದ್ದೇವೆ ನೋಡಿ: ಶೀತ ಕಡಿಮೆ ಮಾಡುವ ಮನೆಮದ್ದುಗಳು ಶೀತ ಬಂದಾಗ ಕೆಲವೊಮ್ಮೆ ವಾರವಾದರೂ ಕಡಿಮೆಯಾಗುವುದಿಲ್ಲ. ಶೀತ ಕಡಿಮೆಯಾಗಬೇಕೆಂದರೆ ವಿಶ್ರಾಂತಿ ತೆಗೆದುಕೊಳ್ಳಬೇಕು ಹಾಗೂ ಈ ಟಿಪ್ಸ್ ಪಾಲಿಸಿ ಕಡಿಮೆಯಾಗುವುದು.
#remediesforcold #homeremedies #coldremedies
entry.summary: ಸಾಮಾನ್ಯ ಶೀತದಷ್ಟೇ ಸರ್ವೇ ಸಾಮಾನ್ಯವಾಗಿದ್ದು ಶೀತಕ್ಕೆ ಮಾಡುವ ಮನೆಮದ್ದುಗಳು. ಈಗಂತೂ ಶೀತ, ಕೆಮ್ಮು ಬಂದಾಗ ಆಸ್ಪತ್ರೆಗೆ ಹೋಗುವ ಬದಲು ಮನೆ ಮದ್ದುಗಳ ಮೊರೆ ಹೋಗುತ್ತಿದ್ದೇವೆ. ಆದರೆ ಕೆಲವೊಂದು ಮನೆಮದ್ದುಗಳನ್ನು ಮಾಡಿದಾಗ ಬೇಗ ಗುಣಮುಖವಾದರೆ, ಇನ್ನು ಕೆಲವೊಮ್ಮೇ ಯಾವುದೇ ಪರಿಣಾಮ ಬೀರುವುದಿಲ್ಲ. ಏಕೆ ಕೆಲವೊಮ್ಮೆ ಸಾಮಾನ್ಯ ಶೀತಕ್ಕೆ ಮಾಡುವ ಮನೆಮದ್ದುಗಳು, ಆ್ಯಂಟಿಬಯೋಟಿಕ್‌ಗಳು ಶೀತವನ್ನು ಕಡಿಮೆ ಮಾಡುವುದಿಲ್ಲ, ಶೀತ ಕಡಿಮೆ ಮಾಡಲು ಏನು ಮಾಡಬೇಕು, ಯಾವ ಮದ್ದುಗಳು ಸಾಮಾನ್ಯ ಶೀತ ಕಡಿಮೆ ಮಾಡಲು ಸಹಕಾರಿ ಎಂಬ ಮಾಹಿತಿ ನೀಡಿದ್ದೇವೆ ನೋಡಿ: ಶೀತ ಕಡಿಮೆ ಮಾಡುವ ಮನೆಮದ್ದುಗಳು ಶೀತ ಬಂದಾಗ ಕೆಲವೊಮ್ಮೆ ವಾರವಾದರೂ ಕಡಿಮೆಯಾಗುವುದಿಲ್ಲ. ಶೀತ ಕಡಿಮೆಯಾಗಬೇಕೆಂದರೆ ವಿಶ್ರಾಂತಿ ತೆಗೆದುಕೊಳ್ಳಬೇಕು ಹಾಗೂ ಈ ಟಿಪ್ಸ್ ಪಾಲಿಸಿ ಕಡಿಮೆಯಾಗುವುದು. #remediesforcold #homeremedies #coldremedies

entry.title: Arcachon : des tests gratuits pour les vacanciers à la plage et à la gare

link.title: Arcachon : des tests gratuits pour les vacanciers à la plage et à la gare

entry.content:
Des équipes mobiles de soignants testent des vacanciers sur la plage, sur le bassin d’Arcachon.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Des équipes mobiles de soignants testent des vacanciers sur la plage, sur le bassin d’Arcachon. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Au Bénin, l’innovation pour ‘résoudre des problèmes africains’

link.title: Au Bénin, l’innovation pour ‘résoudre des problèmes africains’

entry.content: Au Bénin, la cité-campus Sèmè City ambitionne de "résoudre des problèmes africains avec des nouvelles méthodes": elle accompagne les jeunes entrepreneurs et porteurs de projets à développer des start-ups au sein des incubateurs. Récemment, un jeune entrepreneur a développé Xover, une application mobile qui "permet de détecter les différentes personnes qui ont été en contact avec une personne infectée du Covid"
entry.summary: Au Bénin, la cité-campus Sèmè City ambitionne de "résoudre des problèmes africains avec des nouvelles méthodes": elle accompagne les jeunes entrepreneurs et porteurs de projets à développer des start-ups au sein des incubateurs. Récemment, un jeune entrepreneur a développé Xover, une application mobile qui "permet de détecter les différentes personnes qui ont été en contact avec une personne infectée du Covid"

entry.title: Liverpool - Klopp : ‘Il y a deux ou trois ans, personne ne pensait que ce serait possible’

link.title: Liverpool - Klopp : ‘Il y a deux ou trois ans, personne ne pensait que ce serait possible’

entry.content: Mercredi, Liverpool recevra son trophée de champion de Premier League à Anfield. "Les garçons ont travaillé si dur pour cela, tout le monde dans ce club a travaillé dur pour cela" se réjouit Jürgen Klopp.
entry.summary: Mercredi, Liverpool recevra son trophée de champion de Premier League à Anfield. "Les garçons ont travaillé si dur pour cela, tout le monde dans ce club a travaillé dur pour cela" se réjouit Jürgen Klopp.

entry.title: Stand Up Comedy Indra Jegel: Aku Ikut Emak Arisan Minta Mainan, Tangan Mamak Main - LKS

link.title: Stand Up Comedy Indra Jegel: Aku Ikut Emak Arisan Minta Mainan, Tangan Mamak Main - LKS

entry.content:
Dalam episode 8 kali ini, yang akan melakukan battle adalah Komunitas Stand Up Indo Medan melawan Komunitas Stand Up Indo Depok.
Bagaimana hasilnya?
Saksikan penampilan mereka dalam Liga Komunitas Stand Up, Let’s Have Fun.
————————————————————————————————————————————————
Liga Komunitas Stand Up (LKS) adalah ajang kompetisi stand up comedy yang diikuti oleh komunitas Stand Up Indo yang tersebar di seluruh wilayah di Indonesia.
Acara ini memiliki tagline "Let’s Have Fun!".
Dipandu oleh Uus dan Hifdzi, serta dengan 4 orang juri, yaitu Mo Sidik, Ernest Prakasa, Kartika Putri dan Babe Cabita.
Berdasarkan namanya, kompetisi ini tidak berlangsung secara individu, melainkan perwakilan dari masing-masing komunitas.
1 komunitas, mengirimkan 4 orang wakilnya untuk mengikuti acara ini, hingga akhirnya diperoleh 16 tim komunitas yang kemudian ikut serta dalam kompetisi ini.
Liga Komunitas Stand Up diselenggarakan pada tahun 2014-2015.
entry.summary: Dalam episode 8 kali ini, yang akan melakukan battle adalah Komunitas Stand Up Indo Medan melawan Komunitas Stand Up Indo Depok. Bagaimana hasilnya? Saksikan penampilan mereka dalam Liga Komunitas Stand Up, Let’s Have Fun. ———————————————————————————————————————————————— Liga Komunitas Stand Up (LKS) adalah ajang kompetisi stand up comedy yang diikuti oleh komunitas Stand Up Indo yang tersebar di seluruh wilayah di Indonesia. Acara ini memiliki tagline "Let’s Have Fun!". Dipandu oleh Uus dan Hifdzi, serta dengan 4 orang juri, yaitu Mo Sidik, Ernest Prakasa, Kartika Putri dan Babe Cabita. Berdasarkan namanya, kompetisi ini tidak berlangsung secara individu, melainkan perwakilan dari masing-masing komunitas. 1 komunitas, mengirimkan 4 orang wakilnya untuk mengikuti acara ini, hingga akhirnya diperoleh 16 tim komunitas yang kemudian ikut serta dalam kompetisi ini. Liga Komunitas Stand Up diselenggarakan pada tahun 2014-2015.

entry.title: COVID-19 : CM లతో Modi కీలక సమావేశం.. కరోనా కేసులు పెరుగుతున్న క్రమంలో చర్చ! Oneindia Telugu

link.title: COVID-19 : CM లతో Modi కీలక సమావేశం.. కరోనా కేసులు పెరుగుతున్న క్రమంలో చర్చ! Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
As the number of coronavirus cases reached 12,87, 945, Prime Minister Narendra Modi is likely to hold a meeting with chief ministers of all the states on July 27, Monday to discuss the pandemic situation in the country.
#COVID19
#Unlock3
#PMModi
#Lockdown
#PMModiMeetWithCMs
#PMModiVideoConference
#Coronavirus
#COVID19CasesInIndia
దేశంలో కరోనా వైరస్ కేసులు భారీగా పెరిగిన నేపథ్యంలో ప్రధాని నరేంద్ర మోడీ ముఖ్యమంత్రులతో సమావేశం కావాలని నిర్ణయం తీసుకున్నారు. ఈ నెల 27వ తేదీ సోమవారం సీఎంలతో కరోనా వైరస్ ప్రభావం, అన్ లాక్ 3.0 గురించి వీడియో కాన్ఫరెన్స్ ద్వారా సమావేశమై రాష్ట్రాల అభిప్రాయాలు తెలుసుకోనున్నారు..
entry.summary: As the number of coronavirus cases reached 12,87, 945, Prime Minister Narendra Modi is likely to hold a meeting with chief ministers of all the states on July 27, Monday to discuss the pandemic situation in the country. #COVID19 #Unlock3 #PMModi #Lockdown #PMModiMeetWithCMs #PMModiVideoConference #Coronavirus #COVID19CasesInIndia దేశంలో కరోనా వైరస్ కేసులు భారీగా పెరిగిన నేపథ్యంలో ప్రధాని నరేంద్ర మోడీ ముఖ్యమంత్రులతో సమావేశం కావాలని నిర్ణయం తీసుకున్నారు. ఈ నెల 27వ తేదీ సోమవారం సీఎంలతో కరోనా వైరస్ ప్రభావం, అన్ లాక్ 3.0 గురించి వీడియో కాన్ఫరెన్స్ ద్వారా సమావేశమై రాష్ట్రాల అభిప్రాయాలు తెలుసుకోనున్నారు..
